database.notConfigured: Database location is not configured yet.
database.storageHint: Tracks and fingerprints will be stored in the selected database. Ensure sufficient space.
database.existingHint: If you already have a database, pick its manifest (.frkbdb). If missing, choose the legacy folder and it will be upgraded silently.
database.locationRetain: Current database stays at original path; you can delete it or keep using.
database.cannotRead: No FRKB database detected at this path, or the path is unavailable.
database.possibleDamage: Please select an existing FRKB database (.frkbdb), or choose a folder to create a new one.
database.initHintExisting: In the file picker, select the {manifestName} file to enter the existing database.
database.initHintCreate: Select a folder and enter the database name. A subfolder with that name will be created as the database.
database.selectFingerprintModeRequired: Please choose a fingerprint mode (PCM content hash or File hash)
database.invalidManifestFile: Not a valid FRKB database manifest
database.incompatibleManifest: This library requires FRKB {minVersion} or later. Current version: {currentVersion}. Please update and try again.
database.dirHasDatabase: The selected folder already contains a database.
database.dirHasDatabaseOptions: Confirm: enter as existing; Cancel: choose to reset to a brand-new database.
database.parentIsInsideDb: The selected parent path is inside an existing database. Creating a new one inside is not allowed. Please choose:
database.manifestAlreadyExists: FRKB.database (.frkbdb) already exists in this directory. You cannot create a new database here. Please select that file in 'Select existing database', or use an empty directory.
database.resetConfirm: Dangerous: this will clear the library and fingerprints, resetting to a brand-new database. Continue?
database.nonEmptyDirConfirm: The selected directory is not empty. Create a database here anyway? (Using an empty directory or a new subfolder is recommended)

migration.legacyInProgress: Previous upgrade didn't finish. It will run again.
migration.legacyRequired: Legacy library detected. Upgrade required to continue.
migration.legacyActions: The upgrade will reorganize library data. The upgraded library won't work with older FRKB versions. Please don't open it with older versions. Large libraries may take longer. Please don't force quit.

cloudSync.syncIncludesCuratedArtists: This sync also merges curated artist records together with fingerprints.
cloudSync.curatedArtistSkippedUnsupported: The server is on an older version. Curated artist sync was skipped and fingerprint sync still completed.
cloudSync.needUserKeyBeforeDanger: You must configure userKey before performing this dangerous operation. Opening settings...

errors.alreadyLatest: Cloud data is already up to date
errors.sensitiveOperationTooFrequent: Sensitive ops too frequent. Try later.
errors.curatedArtistValidationFailed: Curated artist sync payload validation failed
errors.rateLimitWarning8: FYI: 8 syncs in 5 min. This is 9th. To avoid rate limiting, retry in {seconds}s
errors.rateLimitWarning9: FYI: 9 syncs in 5 min. This is 10th. Retry in {seconds}s
errors.limitExceeded: Server fingerprint quota exceeded (limit: {limit}). Sync aborted.
errors.limitExceededOnCheck: Would exceed server fingerprint quota (limit: {limit}). Sync aborted.

limit.willExceedHint: This sync would exceed the quota limit and has been cancelled.

summary.analyze: Final total {final} would exceed the limit

reset.title: Dangerous: Reset cloud sync data
reset.description: This will delete all cloud fingerprints, curated artist snapshots, and related metadata linked to the current userKey on the server (usage stats are not reset). IRREVERSIBLE. Type DELETE to continue.

library.removeCuratedArtistFavoriteConfirm: Remove "{artist}" from the curated artist list? Matching tracks in Filter will no longer glow.
library.removeCuratedArtistFavoriteSelectHint: This track matches multiple curated artists.
library.removeCuratedArtistFavoriteSelectDesc: Choose which artist to remove. Filter matches for that artist will stop glowing afterward.
library.addToMixtapeByCopy: Copy and add to Mixtape Auto-Recording
library.deduplicateHint: Compare with the fingerprint library; duplicates are skipped (even if previously deleted). When 'Delete after import' is enabled, duplicate files are moved to the Recycle Bin library.
library.deduplicateBatchHint: Analyze fingerprints for this batch and deduplicate within these files only; the existing fingerprint library is not consulted. When 'Delete after import' is enabled, duplicate files are moved to the Recycle Bin library.
library.deduplicateNoneHint: Do not deduplicate. If 'Add to fingerprint library' is enabled, fingerprints will be generated and added for imported tracks (they may be considered existing in later comparisons); otherwise, no fingerprints are written.
library.fingerprintHint: Generate and retain content fingerprints for imported tracks to support future deduplication; they remain even if the track is deleted.
library.nameInvalidChars: Name cannot contain: < > : " / \ | ? * or control characters
library.notExistOnDisk: This item is missing on disk; it may have been deleted.
library.ejectUsbDriveFailed: Failed to eject the USB drive.
library.ejectUsbDriveFailedHint: Close files, playback, or background tasks that may still be using this drive, then try again.
library.ejectUsbDriveInvalidPath: No ejectable USB drive path was found.

pioneer.loadTreeFailed: Failed to load the Pioneer USB library.
pioneer.loadingPlaylistTree: Loading the Pioneer USB playlist tree...
pioneer.emptyPlaylistTree: There are no visible playlists on this USB drive yet.
pioneer.selectPlaylistPrompt: Select a Pioneer playlist from the left first.
pioneer.emptyPlaylist: There are no visible tracks in this playlist yet.
pioneer.mixtapeVaultUnavailable: The Mixtape vault fallback directory is unavailable.
pioneer.copyToMixtapeFailed: Failed to copy tracks into the Mixtape vault.

tracks.title: Tracks
tracks.noTracksHint: Drop folders or audio files to import.
tracks.dragHintInternalSub: Hold {modifier} before dragging to copy out to {target}.
tracks.dragHintExternalSub: Copy out in progress. Release to {target}.
tracks.exportCopyOnlyHint: This source is read-only. Export is copy-only and will not delete source files.
tracks.readOnlySourceDeleteNotAllowed: The current playback source is read-only. Deleting source files is not allowed.
tracks.curatedArtistCountBadgeTitle: "{artist}" has been added to Curated {count} times

metadata.ffmpegFailed: FFmpeg failed to update metadata. Make sure the file is not locked and the format is supported.
metadata.fileNameExists: A file with the same name already exists in this folder
metadata.title: Title
metadata.label: Label
metadata.coverHint: Supports JPG/PNG/WEBP etc. Recommended under 2 MB.
metadata.coverHintWav: WAV specs cannot embed artwork; convert to another format if you need album art.
metadata.acoustidSettingDesc1: 1. Visit acoustid.org and sign in (create an account if you have none).
metadata.acoustidSettingDesc2: 2. After signing in, scroll to the bottom of the page, click "Create new application", give it any name (for example, FRKB on PC), submit it, and copy the 12-character Client Key.
metadata.acoustidSettingDesc3: 3. Paste the Client Key below and save.
metadata.acoustidSettingRateHint: The public key only allows about 3 requests per second for everyone combined. Ask each user to register their own Client Key to avoid throttling.
metadata.autoFillSkipCompleted: Skip previously filled tracks when auto-filling
metadata.autoFillSkipCompletedHint: When enabled, auto-fill will skip tracks that have already been successfully filled before.
metadata.acoustidSetupDesc1: The Client Key is tied to your AcoustID account and can be reused on all of your devices.
metadata.acoustidSetupDesc2: Paste the 12-character key after registering and save to enable fingerprint matching.
metadata.acoustidMissingHint: AcoustID Client Key is required before running fingerprint matching.
metadata.acoustidKeyRequired: Please enter a valid Client Key.
metadata.acoustidKeySaveFailed: Failed to save the key. Please try again.
metadata.acoustidKeyInvalid: Client Key is invalid. Double-check the value or create a new application on acoustid.org.
metadata.acoustidKeyVerifyNetwork: Unable to verify the Client Key because of a network error. Please try again.
metadata.acoustidKeyVerifyTimeout: Client Key verification timed out. Please try again.
metadata.acoustidKeyVerifyUnknown: Failed to verify the Client Key. Please retry later.
metadata.trackNumberError: Track number must be a positive integer
metadata.trackTotalError: Total tracks must be a positive integer
metadata.discNumberError: Disc number must be a positive integer
metadata.discTotalError: Total discs must be a positive integer
metadata.musicbrainzHint: Search MusicBrainz with the current tags and fill the form quickly.
metadata.musicbrainzFingerprintIntro: When this tab is active, AcoustID fingerprint matching runs automatically with your Client Key. Configure it once here (or later in Settings) to reuse it.
metadata.musicbrainzNeedKeyword: Please provide at least one of title/artist/album before searching.
metadata.musicbrainzApplied: Fields filled in. Review before saving.
metadata.musicbrainzRateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later.
metadata.musicbrainzGenericError: Failed to load data from MusicBrainz.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdClientMissing: AcoustID Client Key is missing. Please configure it in Settings before running fingerprint matching.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdToolMissing: fpcalc was not found. Place the Chromaprint binary under vendor/chromaprint.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdFileMissing: Audio file not found; cannot generate fingerprint.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdAnalysisFailed: Fingerprint analysis failed; the format may be unsupported.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdTimeout: Fingerprint match timed out. Please retry.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdRateLimited: AcoustID requests are too frequent. Please retry later.
metadata.musicbrainzAcoustIdNetworkError: AcoustID network error. Please retry later.
metadata.acoustidSetupDesc3: Need to change it later? Open the Settings dialog and update the key there.
metadata.autoFillNeedSelection: Select at least one track before running auto-fill.

autoFillReason.NO_QUERY: Not enough tags to build a query
autoFillReason.FFMPEG_METADATA_FAILED: FFmpeg failed to write tags (often WAV or locked file)

metadata.autoFillFingerprintHintMissing: AcoustID Client Key is not configured, so this run will use text search only.
metadata.autoFillFingerprintHintGuide: Add your Client Key in Settings to enable fingerprint matches for more accurate results.

convert.title: Format conversion
convert.metadataHint: We'll try to keep the tags, but some formats simply don't support metadata.
convert.noNonMp3Files: No non-MP3 files are available to convert, or MP3 copies already exist

player.hideControlsShowWaveform: Hide controls to show longer waveform
player.titleAudioVisualizerToggleHint: Click to switch the display style
player.aiffNotSupported: AIFF/AIF format is not supported for playback
player.audioOutputDeviceUnavailable: The selected output device is unavailable. Reverted to system default.
player.audioOutputNotSupported: Output device switching is not supported in this environment.

fingerprints.importMergeHint: New fingerprints will merge into old.
fingerprints.exportHint: Exported file can be merged on other devices via 'Import fingerprint DB file'.
fingerprints.analysisHint: Analyze all audio in folder/subfolders; store results only; no file changes.
fingerprints.modeFileHint: Calculates on whole file. Fastest but cannot ignore noise; same song with different covers will be treated as different.
fingerprints.modeIncompatibleWarning: Two fingerprint libraries are fully isolated and do not interoperate; switching only affects future analysis and won't migrate/merge history.
fingerprints.noEligibleTracks: Selected items do not contain analyzable audio files.

import.waitForTask: Please wait for the current task

update.networkIssue: Network issue. Check connection or use a proxy.
update.signatureIssue: macOS install validation failed. The update package is not code signed, so auto install cannot continue. Please download the new version manually.
update.installIssue: The update package was downloaded, but installation failed. Quit FRKB and try again, or download the latest version manually.
update.unknownIssue: The update flow failed unexpectedly. Please try again later. If it keeps failing, download the latest version manually.
update.downloadCompleted: Download done. FRKB will update after restart.
update.updateDownloaded: Update downloaded. FRKB will upgrade next start.
update.preparingInstall: Update downloaded. Verifying and preparing installation. FRKB will upgrade after you quit the app.
update.manualCloseWarning: Before replacing the old version, quit the FRKB that is currently running.
update.manualStepOpenFile: 1. When the download finishes, FRKB will try to open the downloaded file for you. If you still do not see FRKB, use the buttons below.
update.manualStepCloseApp: 2. Before replacing the old version, quit the FRKB that is currently running.
update.manualStepReplaceApp: 3. When you see FRKB, drag it into Applications.
update.manualStepReplaceConfirm: 4. If macOS asks whether to replace the old version, click Replace.
update.manualStepOpenFromApps: 5. When that is done, open FRKB from Applications.
update.manualStepRightClickOpen: 6. If it does not open the first time, right-click the FRKB icon and choose Open.

whatsNew.title: FRKB Release Notes
whatsNew.subtitle: Published: {date}
whatsNew.noChangelog: This release does not provide changelog details

shortcuts.shortcutSetFailed: Failed to set shortcut. May conflict.
shortcuts.playerGlobalShortcutsHint: These combos still work even if the app is minimized.
shortcuts.globalPlayerShortcutHint: Shift + Alt + Arrow is the default combo. You can customize it anytime in Settings.
shortcuts.horizontalTopBarJump: Top deck back / forward one bar
shortcuts.horizontalBottomBarJump: Bottom deck back / forward one bar

search.globalSongPlaceholder: Type keywords (title / artist / album / composer / year / genre / key / BPM / filename / path)

playlist.deduplicateConfirm: We will analyze this playlist using the current fingerprint mode (content hash / file hash) and move duplicates to the recycle bin. Continue?

mixtape.title: Mixtape Auto-Recording
mixtape.mixModeCreateHint: This mode is saved to the current project and cannot be changed after creation.
mixtape.mixModePersistFailed: Failed to save the project mode. Please try again.
mixtape.stemModeCreateHint: This mode is saved to the current project and cannot be changed after creation.
mixtape.stemModePersistFailed: Failed to save the project stem mode. Please try again.
mixtape.stemProfilePersistFailed: Failed to save stem mode. Please try again.
mixtape.stemProfileChooseHint: After creating this Stem project, Stem mode will be used consistently for separation and export.
mixtape.stemCpuSlowHint: Stem separation can only run on CPU right now. It will be much slower, but it can usually still complete. This is usually because GPU acceleration is currently unavailable; updated graphics drivers or better hardware will usually make it faster.
mixtape.stemCpuSlowHintReasonGpuUnavailable: GPU acceleration is unavailable right now, so CPU separation is used
mixtape.stemCpuSlowHintReasonGpuFailed: GPU acceleration is currently unavailable, switched to CPU separation
mixtape.stemCpuSlowHintReasonGpuBackendMissing: This computer does not currently support GPU acceleration, so CPU separation is used
mixtape.stemCpuSlowHintReasonUnknown: GPU acceleration is unavailable right now, switched to CPU separation
mixtape.stemRuntimeNetworkHint: Check your network connection. If GitHub is unreachable from the current network, try enabling a VPN or make sure the system proxy / PAC is applied to FRKB.
mixtape.stemSeparationBlockingHint: Editing is temporarily unavailable until stem separation completes.
mixtape.stemSeparationLifecycleHint: Separation is on-demand preprocessing: it runs only when a track first lacks stems, when source/model changes, or when you manually retry; reopening the project will not re-run full separation.
mixtape.stemTrackSilentHint: Editing stays available. Playback will stay silent while this section is not ready.
mixtape.stemTrackSilentHintShort: Unready tracks stay silent in preview
mixtape.stemTrackFailedHint: This section cannot be previewed yet. Retry later.
mixtape.stemRetryFailed: Failed to retry stem separation. Please try again later.
mixtape.stemSeparationPreparingHint: Cold start needs time to inspect missing stems, load models, and build jobs, so the first entry may take a while.
mixtape.stemSeparationRunningHint: {count} active separation tasks are running. Detailed lines will refresh as soon as live progress arrives.
mixtape.stemSeparationPreparingStepQueue: Checking which tracks in the current project still need usable stems…
mixtape.stemSeparationPreparingStepWaveform: Preparing waveform/cache data required for later project editing…
mixtape.trackEmptyHint: Drag from playlists or use Add to Mixtape Auto-Recording
mixtape.outputPathRequired: Please choose an output folder first.
mixtape.outputFilenameRequired: Please enter an output file name.
mixtape.outputNoTracks: There are no tracks to export in this recording.
mixtape.outputKeyLockUnavailable: This export contains track(s) with Master Tempo enabled, but offline Key Lock is unavailable. Export was aborted to avoid producing incorrect output.
mixtape.stemNotReadyForExport: {count} track(s) still have stems not ready and cannot be exported yet.
mixtape.exportStemPreparing: Started preparing export-profile stems ({count} track(s)). Export again after it finishes.
mixtape.removeFromPlaylistFailed: Failed to remove the track from the Mixtape Auto-Recording playlist. Please try again.
mixtape.envelopeEditHint: Click to add, drag to adjust, double-click to delete
mixtape.masterTempoLaneDragHint: Double-click or right-click a point to remove it.
mixtape.loopModeHint: Enable loop mode to mark a DJ-style repeat section on one track
mixtape.loopEditHint: Click two valid grid lines to create a loop. Click any loop segment to show +/- and Clear. To change A/B, clear the loop and pick again
mixtape.loopGridUnavailableHint: No selectable grid lines yet. Wait for BPM / first beat analysis
mixtape.loopSelectionLockedHint: Pick the other end on this track
mixtape.loopSelectionCrossTrackError: Point 2 must stay on the current track
mixtape.loopSelectionStartBlockedError: Loop range cannot be the start
mixtape.segmentMuteHint: Drag over segments to toggle mute. Dragging again toggles them off
mixtape.stemSegmentHint: Stem uses segment toggles only (auto-enabled). Drag directly on waveform segments to toggle
mixtape.autoGainDialogHint: Pick one reference track, then generate full gain envelopes for all tracks automatically.
mixtape.autoGainSelectLoudestNoCandidate: Selection completed, but no valid reference track was found.
mixtape.autoGainSelectQuietestNoCandidate: Selection completed, but no valid reference track was found.
mixtape.autoGainFailed: Auto gain failed. Please try again.
mixtape.autoGainSelectLoudestFailed: Failed to pick the loudest reference track. Please try again.
mixtape.autoGainSelectQuietestFailed: Failed to pick the quietest reference track. Please try again.
mixtape.gridAdjustSetBarLine: Pick grid line as new bar line
mixtape.gridAdjustSetBarLineHint: Move near a grid line to highlight it, then click to set bar line
mixtape.gridAdjustSaveResetEnvelopeHint: Saving this change will move grid lines and reset this track's envelopes to the initial flat state. Continue?
mixtape.gridAdjustViewHint: Drag horizontally to pan, zoom by wheel or slider
mixtape.gridAdjustRenderBrowserRateWithContext: Render: WebAudio raw waveform ({rate} kHz, ctx {contextRate} kHz)
mixtape.bpmAnalyzingHint: This may take a while on first load
mixtape.bpmAnalyzeFailedHint: {count} track(s) failed to analyze. Grid lines are disabled.
mixtape.bpmAnalyzeFailedAutoCloseHint: This notice will close automatically in {seconds}s.
mixtape.transportPreloadingHint: Decoding all tracks for timeline playback. Please wait.
mixtape.transportDecodeFailed: {count} track(s) failed to decode and cannot be played on timeline.
mixtape.transportPartialDecodeFailed: {count} track(s) failed to decode and were skipped.
mixtape.transportStemNotReady: {count} track(s) have stems not ready and cannot be played on timeline.
mixtape.transportStemNotReadySkipped: {count} track(s) have stems not ready and were skipped.
mixtape.transportStemSilentHint: {count} track(s) have stems not ready. Playback will stay silent for those sections.
mixtape.transportMissingDuration: {count} track(s) are missing duration metadata and cannot be played on timeline.
mixtape.missingTracksRemovedSummary: {count} track(s) were not found in both recycle bin and the Mixtape Auto-Recording vault, and have been removed from the Mixtape Auto-Recording playlist and project.
mixtape.missingTracksRemovedMore: {count} additional track(s) are not shown here.
mixtape.deleteBlockedWindowOpen: This Mixtape Auto-Recording window is currently open, so the Mixtape Auto-Recording playlist cannot be deleted.
mixtape.deleteBlockedWindowOpenHint: Please close the Mixtape Auto-Recording window first, then try deleting again.

analysisRuntime.promptTitle: An analysis runtime component is available
analysisRuntime.promptBody: This computer supports using {title} to accelerate BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation. You can download this component ({size}) now. Until it is installed, those features stay unavailable.
analysisRuntime.promptHint: If GitHub is unreachable from the current network, try enabling a VPN or make sure the system proxy / PAC is applied to FRKB.
analysisRuntime.downloadBlockingHint: BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation stay unavailable until setup finishes.
analysisRuntime.extractingText: Download complete. Extracting and validating the runtime...
analysisRuntime.readyHint: {title} is ready. Future BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation will use this runtime automatically.
analysisRuntime.unsupportedHint: This computer does not currently support a downloadable analysis runtime. BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation are unavailable.
analysisRuntime.manifestUnavailableHint: Unable to fetch the analysis runtime manifest. This is usually caused by network, GitHub access, or proxy configuration issues.
analysisRuntime.downloadFailedHint: Failed to download the analysis runtime. BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation are unavailable right now.
analysisRuntime.horizontalBlockedHint: Dual-track horizontal browse is unavailable until the analysis runtime is installed.
analysisRuntime.helpButtonHint: Download this runtime to enable BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation.

recycleBin.deleteSummaryRestoredFailed: {count} track(s) that failed to delete were restored to the list
recycleBin.progressFailed: Recycle bin clear did not finish
recycleBin.restoreMissingPlaylistHint: Original playlist no longer exists. Please move it to Filter/Curated manually.

about.author: Author: Coder 'Programmer/DJ'
about.prereleaseHint: This is a pre-release build. May be unstable. Please use with caution or download the stable version.

errorReport.hint: Only crash and error logs are uploaded. No user data is included.

errors.diskFullInterruptedHint: Insufficient space. Completed {0}, pending {1}. Free space then retry or skip the rest.

filters.noResultsHint: Try widening conditions or clear filters.

settings.showPlaylistTrackCount: Show track count after playlist name

curatedArtistTracking.title: Curated artist tracking
curatedArtistTracking.desc: When a track is added to Curated, remember its artist together with the related track fingerprints. Matching artists in Filter get a soft gold highlight, and these records also take part in cloud sync.
curatedArtistTracking.managerDesc: This list shows every curated artist stored in the current library. You can add, edit, or delete entries manually.
curatedArtistTracking.managerValidationPlaceholder: Artist names must stay non-empty and unique.
curatedArtistTracking.managerAddedCountTitle: "{artist}" has been added to Curated {count} times
curatedArtistTracking.managerEmpty: No curated artists are recorded yet. Add one from the top-right button.
curatedArtistTracking.managerSaveFailed: Failed to save the curated artist list
curatedArtistTracking.clearDesc: {count} curated artists are recorded in the current library.
curatedArtistTracking.emptyHint: No curated artists have been recorded in the current library yet.
curatedArtistTracking.clearConfirmLine1: This will clear the curated artist list stored in the current library.
curatedArtistTracking.clearConfirmLine2: It will not delete tracks or change the Curated library contents. Continue?
curatedArtistTracking.clearSuccess: The curated artist list has been cleared.
curatedArtistTracking.clearFailed: Failed to clear the curated artist list

songListBubble.title: Track row bubble tooltip
songListBubble.overflowOnly: Show only when text is truncated
songListBubble.hint: Controls how tooltips show in track lists

settings.currentLibraryPathHint: Shows the FRKB library root currently in use for quick confirmation and troubleshooting.

clearDirtyData.title: Clean Dirty Library Data (Dev/Prerelease only)
clearDirtyData.desc: Keeps songs, playlists/tree, fingerprints, settings and recycle-bin records; clears analysis and Mixtape Auto-Recording related data/caches.
clearDirtyData.confirmLine1: This will clear analysis results, Mixtape Auto-Recording playlist data, and related caches in the current library.
clearDirtyData.confirmLine2: Songs, playlists/tree, fingerprints, settings, and recycle-bin records will be kept. Continue?
clearDirtyData.successLine2: Deleted {sqliteRows} SQLite rows, removed {libraryItems} library cache items, and removed {userDataItems} userData cache items.

clearAnalysisRuntime.title: Clear Local Analysis Runtime (Dev/Prerelease only)
clearAnalysisRuntime.desc: Remove the downloaded shared runtime and download cache used by BPM/grid analysis and stem separation. After clearing, the app behaves like a fresh install that has never downloaded a runtime.
clearAnalysisRuntime.confirmLine1: This will delete the local analysis runtime and its download cache.
clearAnalysisRuntime.confirmLine2: After clearing, BPM/grid analysis, dual-track horizontal browse, and stem separation will prompt for download again. Restarting the app afterwards is recommended.
clearAnalysisRuntime.successLine1: The local analysis runtime has been cleared.
clearAnalysisRuntime.successLine2: The runtime directory and download cache were removed. After restarting, the app will prompt again as if no runtime had ever been downloaded.
clearAnalysisRuntime.failed: Failed to clear the local analysis runtime

layout.headerHint: Reordered by usage priority, with high-risk actions isolated at the end.
layout.quickNavDesc: Jump straight to the area you want instead of scrolling through a long list.
layout.instantApplyDesc: Except for dangerous actions, most settings are saved and applied immediately.
layout.summaryDesc: The settings most likely to be changed repeatedly are surfaced first.
layout.sectionCommonDesc: Theme, language, output device, and frequently changed basics stay here first.
layout.sectionPlaybackDesc: Player behavior, waveform display, and global shortcuts live in one place.
layout.sectionMetadataDesc: Manage AcoustID, fingerprint mode, and scan formats without extra hopping around.
layout.sectionLibraryDesc: Everything that affects list display, curated linkage, and library actions is grouped here.
layout.sectionSafetyDesc: High-risk operations are isolated at the end to reduce accidental clicks.

fileSelector.title: Select Files/Folders
fileSelector.helpText: Click to select/deselect items, double-click folders to navigate, Enter to confirm, Esc to cancel
fileSelector.name: Name
